channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: New Magic: The Gathering Garfield Secret Lair Brings Lasagna and Dread of Mondays
item.content:encoded:
Wizards of the Coast has announced a Magic: The Gathering Garfield Secret Lair. The latest crossover in the popular trading card game introduces classic cards with new artwork, and featuring the characters, from the ubiquitous Garfield comic strip.

According to an official press release, the Magic: The Gathering Garfield Secret Lair will be available as part of the Cats are the Best Superdrop. Given Garfield is one of the most iconic cartoon cats in the world, this makes sense. Like all prior Secret Lairs, the drops will feature Magic: The Gathering cards with alternative artwork sporting Garfield and friends.

The Garfield Secret Lair will be broken up into three separate drops. The first one, Secret Lair x Garfield: As Intended, features five cards with artwork taken straight from the Garfield comic strips, intentionally imitating the artstyle of Magic's early days. The drop contains the following cards

  • Swords to Plowshares
  • Counterspell
  • Dark Ritual
  • Earthquake
  • Fog

The second drop, Secret Lair x Garfield: Motivationally Challenged, reimagines five cards in the style of Garfield motivational posters. The kind you might see in office cubicles, waiting rooms, or even someone's bedroom. What better way to declare your hate for Mondays than by putting down a card. The drop reimagines the following cards:

  • Rin and Seri, Inseparable as "Garfield and Odie: Best Buds"
  • Orim's Chant as "Talk to the Paw"
  • Ponder as "Hang in There"
  • Beast Within as "I Hate Mondays"
  • Sol Ring 

The third and final Magic: The Gathering Garfield Secret Lair is Secret Lair x Garfield: Our Only Thought is to Entertain You. This drop has the most surreal artwork of the drop, invoking the diverse Garfield fan art in the world as well the more bizarre, even sinister, interpretations that have popped up online. The drop contains the following cards:

  • It That Betrays
  • Maddening Cacophony
  • Maddening Hex
  • Hunter's Insight
  • Molten Collapse

Each drop in the Garfield Secret Lair will be available on June 15. Each drop will be available in non-foil ($29.99) and foil ($39.99) while supplies last. 

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler
